nodes.recentposition: Computation Intern at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory in Livermore, CA
nodes.involvements: Mock Trial, Middle Earth Housing Resident Advisor
nodes.bios: Hey there! My name is Brian and I initiated in the fall of my sophomore year. My favorite pastimes include watching TV, playing basketball, and spending time with friends. I also enjoy trying new things, whether it be food or activities. Ask me about my basketball history obsession at recruitment!
